abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: This model may not be the target of actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

abilities.name: Whisper in Their Ear
abilities.text: When a friendly leader in play with a Hunger token activates, this model may draw a card.

actions.name: Cling to Death
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Allies within (aura)2" of the target heal 1.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Death's Door
triggers.text: The target gains an Incurable token.

actions.name: Purify
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Dark Benediction
actions.effects: Target gains a Hunger token. If it does so, it may gain this model's choice of an Insight or Adaptable token.

triggers.name: Hushed Domain
triggers.text: Once per activation. Look at the top three cards of this model's fate deck, discard any number of them, and place the remaining cards back on top of the deck in any order.
